query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hydration_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  targetMl INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 2000,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE INDEX hydration_settings_userId_unique (userId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sleep_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  targetHours DECIMAL(3,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 8.0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE INDEX sleep_settings_userId_unique (userId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sleep_settings (

  userId INT NOT NULL,
